subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enkindled by the fire of the love of God! Verily, I have perused thy beautiful letter
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها المشتعله بنار محبت الله انی طالعت نمیقتک الغراء و تحریرک البدیع الانشاء
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @unity; oneness of humanity, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar]
